prompt: Define an operating system in one short sentence.
output_preview: An operating system is a software program that manages the hardware and software resources of a computer system, allowing users to run programs and perform task…
notes: PyTorch dynamic INT8 (torch.ao.quantization.quantize_dynamic on Linear modules) vs FP32 reference, same cached Qwen2-0.5B, CPU. Dynamic INT8 only — NOT GGUF, NOT Q4, NOT Q8.
output_text: An operating system is a software program that manages the hardware and software resources of a computer system, allowing users to run programs and perform tasks.
